docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $135.00) SERVED DEC-13-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, ANNIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---KATY TANG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,466.95 FILED BY TANG, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, ANNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, TONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUNG, ANNIE $7,466.95 PRINCIPAL, $210.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,676.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, ANNIE
